plant.title: Ponytail Palm
plant.summary: The Ponytail Palm is a unique, low-maintenance succulent with a bulbous trunk and long, curly leaves. It is completely non-toxic to cats and dogs, making it a safe and striking addition to any home.
plant.contentHtml: Beaucarnea recurvata, despite its name, is not a true palm but a member of the Asparagaceae family. Native to Mexico, it stores water in its thick trunk, allowing it to withstand drought. The plant thrives in bright light and infrequent watering. Its whimsical, hair-like leaves give it a distinctive appearance that becomes more dramatic with age.
